## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation / research note

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added or updated **tests** that prove my change works
- [ ] `composer test`, `composer analyse`, `composer rector`, `composer format` all pass
- [ ] I updated the `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs (`README.md` / `docs/`)

## Legal / compliance impact (German tax & bookkeeping law)

- [ ] This change does **not** touch any legal rule
- [ ] This change touches a legal rule (field, deadline, rate, retention,
      numbering, rounding) and I have cited an **authoritative primary source**
      below and updated `docs/research/`
